function.name: AuthenticateServicePrincipalAsync
function.description: Authenticate with Azure AD using service principal and client secret

applicationId.description: The application (client) ID of the service principal

clientSecret.description: The client secret for the service principal

function.name: AuthenticateInteractiveAsync
function.description: Authenticate with Azure AD using interactive login

function.name: StartDeviceCodeAuthAsync
function.description: Start device code authentication - returns device code and URL immediately for user action

function.name: CheckDeviceAuthStatusAsync
function.description: Check the status of pending device code authentication

function.name: GetAuthenticationStatus
function.description: Get current authentication status and profile information

function.name: SignOutAsync
function.description: Clear current authentication and sign out

function.name: GetAccessTokenAsync
function.description: Get current access token for authenticated user

function.name: ListWorkspacesAsync
function.description: Lists all workspaces the user has permission for. Returns workspaces filtered by the specified roles if provided.

roles.description: A list of roles. Separate values using a comma (e.g., 'Admin,Member,Contributor,Viewer'). If not provided, all workspaces are returned.

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

preferWorkspaceSpecificEndpoints.description: Include workspace-specific API endpoints in the response (true/false, optional)

function.name: ListCapacitiesAsync
function.description: Lists all capacities the user has permission for (either administrator or contributor)

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: ListSupportedConnectionTypesAsync
function.description: Lists supported connection types with their creation methods, parameters, and supported credential types. Used to populate the Create Connection form.

gatewayId.description: Optional gateway ID to filter supported types for a specific gateway

function.name: ListConnectionsAsync
function.description: Lists all connections the user has permission for, including on-premises, virtual network and cloud connections

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: GetConnectionAsync
function.description: Gets details about a specific connection by its ID

connectionId.description: The ID of the connection to retrieve

function.name: CreateConnectionAsync
function.description: Creates a new data source connection. Supports cloud, on-premises (gateway), and virtual network connectivity types.

creationMethod.description: Creation method name from ListSupportedConnectionTypes. Defaults to connectionType if not specified.

connectionParameters.description: Connection parameters as JSON string of name:value pairs, e.g. '{"server":"myserver.com","database":"mydb"}'

credentialType.description: Credential type: Anonymous, Basic, Windows, OAuth2, Key, SharedAccessSignature, ServicePrincipal, WorkspaceIdentity, KeyPair

credentials.description: Credentials as JSON name-value pairs matching the credentialType

privacyLevel.description: Privacy level: None, Organizational, Public, or Private

connectionEncryption.description: Connection encryption: NotEncrypted, Encrypted, or Any

connectivityType.description: Connectivity type: ShareableCloud, OnPremisesGateway, or VirtualNetworkGateway

gatewayId.description: Gateway ID (required for OnPremisesGateway and VirtualNetworkGateway types)

function.name: create_connection_ui
function.description: Shows a form for creating a new data source connection. Use this when the user wants to add a new connection to a data source.

function.name: ListGatewaysAsync
function.description: Lists all gateways the user has permission for, including on-premises, on-premises (personal mode), and virtual network gateways

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: GetGatewayAsync
function.description: Gets details about a specific gateway by its ID

gatewayId.description: The ID of the gateway to retrieve

function.name: create_virtualnetwork_gateway
function.description: Creates a new virtual network gateway in Microsoft Fabric

capacityId.description: The capacity ID where the gateway will be created

subscriptionId.description: Azure subscription ID containing the virtual network

resourceGroupName.description: Azure resource group name containing the virtual network

subnetName.description: Name of the subnet within the virtual network

inactivityMinutesBeforeSleep.description: Number of minutes of inactivity before the gateway goes to sleep. Valid values: 30, 60, 90, 120, 150, 240, 360, 480, 720, 1440

function.name: ListDataflowsAsync
function.description: Returns a list of Dataflows from the specified workspace. This API supports pagination.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID to list dataflows from (required)

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: CreateDataflowAsync
function.description: Creates a Dataflow in the specified workspace. The workspace must be on a supported Fabric capacity.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID where the dataflow will be created (required)

folderId.description: The folder ID where the dataflow will be created (optional, defaults to workspace root)

function.name: AddConnectionToDataflowAsync
function.description: Adds or replaces connections in an existing dataflow, or clears all connections. When clearExisting is true with no connectionIds, all connections are removed. When clearExisting is true with connectionIds, existing connections are replaced. When clearExisting is false (default), connections are appended.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the dataflow (required)

connectionIds.description: The connection ID(s) to add. Can be a single string or an array. Optional when clearExisting is true.

clearExisting.description: When true, clears existing connections before adding new ones. Defaults to false.

function.name: AddOrUpdateQueryInDataflowAsync
function.description: Adds or updates a query in an existing dataflow by updating its definition. The query will be added to the mashup.pq file and registered in queryMetadata.json.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the dataflow (required)

queryName.description: The name of the query to add or update (required)

mCode.description: The M (Power Query) code for the query (required). Can be a full 'let...in' expression or a simple expression.

function.name: get_dataflow_definition
function.description: Gets the definition of a dataflow with human-readable content (queryMetadata.json, mashup.pq M code, and .platform metadata).

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the dataflow (required)

dataflowId.description: The dataflow ID to get the definition for (required)

function.name: save_dataflow_definition
function.description: Saves a dataflow definition by validating and persisting an M section document. Validates M document syntax, extracts individual queries, and saves each query to the dataflow. The M document should start with 'section Section1;' and contain all shared queries.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the target dataflow (required)

dataflowId.description: The dataflow ID to save the document to (required)

mDocument.description: The complete M section document to validate and save (required). Should start with 'section Section1;' and contain all shared queries.

validateOnly.description: If true, only validates without saving (optional, defaults to false)

function.name: ExecuteQueryAsync
function.description: Executes a query against a dataflow and returns the complete results in Apache Arrow format. Runs M (Power Query) language queries against data sources connected through the dataflow.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the dataflow (required)

dataflowId.description: The dataflow ID to execute the query against (required)

queryName.description: The name of the query to execute (required)

customMashupDocument.description: The M (Power Query) language query to execute. Can be a raw M expression or a complete section document.

function.name: RefreshDataflowBackground
function.description: Start a dataflow refresh in the background. Returns immediately with task info. You'll receive a notification when the refresh completes.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the dataflow (required)

displayName.description: User-friendly name for notifications (optional, defaults to dataflow ID)

executeOption.description: Execute option: 'SkipApplyChanges' (default, faster) or 'ApplyChangesIfNeeded' (applies pending changes first)

function.name: RefreshDataflowStatus
function.description: Check the status of a dataflow refresh operation. Use this to manually poll for status if you started a refresh with RefreshDataflowBackground.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the dataflow (required)

jobInstanceId.description: The job instance ID from RefreshDataflowBackground result (required)

function.name: ListPipelinesAsync
function.description: Returns a list of Pipelines from the specified workspace. This API supports pagination.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID to list pipelines from (required)

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: CreatePipelineAsync
function.description: Creates a Pipeline in the specified workspace.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID where the pipeline will be created (required)

folderId.description: The folder ID where the pipeline will be created (optional, defaults to workspace root)

function.name: GetPipelineAsync
function.description: Gets the metadata of a Pipeline by ID.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

function.name: GetPipelineDefinitionAsync
function.description: Gets the definition of a Pipeline. The definition contains the pipeline JSON configuration with base64-encoded parts.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

pipelineId.description: The pipeline ID to get the definition for (required)

function.name: UpdatePipelineAsync
function.description: Updates the metadata (displayName and/or description) of a Pipeline.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

function.name: UpdatePipelineDefinitionAsync
function.description: Updates the definition of a Pipeline with the provided JSON content. The JSON will be base64-encoded and sent to the API.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

function.name: RunPipelineAsync
function.description: Runs a Pipeline on demand. Returns a job instance ID that can be used to track the run status with GetPipelineRunStatusAsync.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

executionDataJson.description: Optional execution data as JSON string for parameterized pipeline runs (optional)

function.name: GetPipelineRunStatusAsync
function.description: Gets the status of a Pipeline run (job instance). Possible statuses: NotStarted, InProgress, Completed, Failed, Cancelled, Deduped.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

jobInstanceId.description: The job instance ID returned from RunPipelineAsync (required)

function.name: CreatePipelineScheduleAsync
function.description: Creates a schedule for a Pipeline. Supports Cron, Daily, Weekly, and Monthly schedule types. An item can have up to 20 schedules.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

configurationJson.description: The schedule configuration as JSON string (required). Supported types: Cron, Daily, Weekly, Monthly.

function.name: ListPipelineSchedulesAsync
function.description: Lists all schedules for a Pipeline. Returns schedule configurations, status, and owner information.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the pipeline (required)

pipelineId.description: The pipeline ID to list schedules for (required)

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: ListCopyJobsAsync
function.description: Returns a list of Copy Jobs from the specified workspace. This API supports pagination.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID to list copy jobs from (required)

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)

function.name: CreateCopyJobAsync
function.description: Creates a Copy Job in the specified workspace.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID where the copy job will be created (required)

description.description: The Copy Job description (optional, max 256 characters)

folderId.description: The folder ID (optional, defaults to workspace root)

function.name: GetCopyJobAsync
function.description: Gets the metadata of a Copy Job by ID.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to retrieve (required)

function.name: GetCopyJobDefinitionAsync
function.description: Gets the definition of a Copy Job. Contains copy job JSON configuration with base64-encoded parts.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to get the definition for (required)

function.name: UpdateCopyJobAsync
function.description: Updates the metadata (displayName and/or description) of a Copy Job.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to update (required)

function.name: UpdateCopyJobDefinitionAsync
function.description: Updates the definition of a Copy Job with provided JSON content. The JSON will be base64-encoded and sent to the API.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to update (required)

definitionJson.description: The copy job definition JSON content (required)

function.name: RunCopyJobAsync
function.description: Runs a Copy Job on demand. Returns a job instance ID that can be used to track the run status with GetCopyJobRunStatusAsync.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to run (required)

executionDataJson.description: Optional execution data as JSON string (optional)

function.name: GetCopyJobRunStatusAsync
function.description: Gets the status of a Copy Job run (job instance). Possible statuses: NotStarted, InProgress, Completed, Failed, Cancelled, Deduped.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

jobInstanceId.description: The job instance ID returned from RunCopyJobAsync (required)

function.name: CreateCopyJobScheduleAsync
function.description: Creates a schedule for a Copy Job. Supports Cron, Daily, Weekly, and Monthly schedule types. An item can have up to 20 schedules.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to schedule (required)

configurationJson.description: The schedule configuration as JSON string (required). Supported types: Cron, Daily, Weekly, Monthly.

function.name: ListCopyJobSchedulesAsync
function.description: Lists all schedules for a Copy Job. Returns schedule configurations, status, and owner information.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID containing the copy job (required)

copyJobId.description: The copy job ID to list schedules for (required)

continuationToken.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results (optional)
